name: Baked Mushroom Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large skillet, heat rice over medium heat, stirring constantly until it turns golden brown. Transfer the rice to an 8-quart casserole dish.
3. In the same skillet, melt butter; add onions and mushrooms and sauté for five minutes until tender.
4. Bake in the oven for 1 1/4 hours, adding water if necessary to keep moist until rice is tender.
